//: Copy to bench.config.json and edit. One 'run' = one opencode TUI building into one NocoBase env.
//recipes: Named launch methods keyed by experiment type. A run REFERENCES one via its `recipe` field (or `type`: build -> nocobase-build). Built-ins live in bench.py DEFAULT_RECIPES (generic, nocobase-build); add/override here. Placeholders {promptFile} {env} {model} are filled per run. The per-CLI TUI creation stays in adapters.py; a recipe only picks cli/cwd/readyTimeout/instruction/watchFor/defaultNudge.

nocobase-build.instruction: First read the nocobase-prototype-repro skill (SKILL.md + references/). Then read {promptFile} as the user requirement and reproduce it END-TO-END in the NocoBase env '{env}' via the nb CLI (ALWAYS pass -e {env}): SPEC -> data modeling in ONE pass -> all-English seed (every enum) -> list pages (Filter+Add+Table+View drawer+sub-tables) -> refine signature regions -> screenshot self-check >=80%. Autonomous, no questions. End with a FINAL REPORT: collections, signature pageUid(s), Self-Score, comparison notes, gaps.
nocobase-build.defaultNudge: Continue the NocoBase build. If blocked, state the exact blocker in one line, then proceed autonomously; always pass -e <env>.

gateway.//: OpenAI-compatible endpoint used ONLY by the LLM supervisor (monitor --judge llm).

monitor.defaultNudge: Continue. If blocked, state the exact blocker in one line, then proceed autonomously.

//watchFor: global hints (per-run watchFor overrides) — fed into each run's brief for the supervisor
watchFor: long idle with no spinner + the same step repeating = stalled, nudge
an Allow/Approve prompt = permission, needs a keypress
context > ~180K while still not producing the page = likely looping

runs.goal: Reproduce a lightweight CRM (5 pages) natively in NocoBase from the prompt.
successCriteria: crm_customers / crm_contacts / crm_deals / crm_activities collections + relations exist
5 pages under a CRM menu group: Dashboard, Pipeline, Customers, Contacts, Activities
Dashboard uses native Chart blocks (not a stack of tables)
drawer sub-tables auto-filter to the parent record
a final report with the page schemaUids is printed
watchFor: belongsTo named *_id → beta rejects it (use a noun)
pie chart rendering as a solid circle (series not paired)

runs.goal: Same CRM build as crm-r1 — consistency check across instances.
Same CRM build as crm-r1 — consistency check across instances.
